Fun fact, they still make Glass.  Its aimed at enterprise users where having both hands free is important for, say, a doctor or an engineer, but you can still obtain them as a normal "consumer".  Also, "ok Glass" became "ok Google", which is now the Google Assistant we all probably know about on our phones, watches, cars, and vase things.

All this technology is making me feel so fucking old. I'm like a 20th century relic who belongs in an Antique store or something. When I was a kid if you had a color TV it meant you were rich- now kids watch TV on their cell phones in HD... in my day HD was two pieces of tin foil on the end of your rabbit ears. The first computer I saw was the size of a damn Buick- today kids have cheap pocket calculators that can do more than that computer did. When I was a kid the only way to "text" your buddy would be to get out a fucking typewriter, type some shit, put it in an envelope and mail it out, and wait a week for your response. The only way to call your buddy from outside the house was to jump into a phone booth where some bum just pissed on the floor... only to have the operator keep yelling at you to put more money into the phone. If you wanted to watch a movie, you went to the theater, or you prayed to hell that it would eventually come on one of the 4 channels you had. Now we have a pair of fucking sunglasses that has a hundred times more processing power than the first home computer system I purchased as an adult. It's just overwhelming to see the changes in my lifetime, and God knows what I will see before its all over. From LP's and 8 tracks to digital downloads. Holy shit. I still have my record collection- it takes a huge shelving unit to store all my music, and today I could store all of the songs on every one of my hundreds of records and THOUSANDS more on a chip the size of my fucking pinky finger. If you had told me that even 20 years ago in the 90's I would have laughed at you. At the time we thought the 90's was futuristic as all hell- we had no idea. Could you imagine what Thomas Edison would say about all of this?? lol
